title: KOSIS Consumer Price Index (2020=100), whole country, annual
source_org: Statistics Korea (KOSIS / Ministry of Data and Statistics)
frequency: annual (monthly and quarterly also available in the same table on request)
license_terms: KOSIS (Statistics Korea) — Open Government Data, free reuse with attribution
notes: TASK FINDING: KOSIS statistical-table viewer (statHtml.do) DOES allow anonymous CSV/Excel/SDMX export with NO login and NO API key. The GUI 'Download' button opens a modal offering XLSX/XLS/CSV/TXT/SDMX formats, confirmed by loading it in-browser. Under the hood it is a 2-step flow: (1) POST the table's #ParamInfo form (serialized) to /statHtml/downGrid.do -> returns JSON {file:'<server-side temp filename>'}; (2) POST the same form (with file=<that name>) to /statHtml/downNormal.do -> returns the file bytes directly (CSV in this case). Both endpoints are session-cookie-scoped (JSESSIONID from the initial statHtml.do page load) but require no personal login or registered API key — this is different from KOSIS's separate 'Open API' (kosis.kr/openapi/) which DOES require a registered apiKey. Replicated this flow via same-origin fetch() in a live browser session (cookies auto-included) rather than raw curl, since curl would need to first establish/pass the JSESSIONID. Also had to override the default query window: the table defaults to loading only the most recent 6 periods; requesting the full 1965-2025 annual range required rewriting the 'fieldList' PRD parameter's prdValue field client-side before the downGrid.do call. Table used: orgId=101, tblId=DT_1J22003 ('CPI(2020=100)'), found via KOSIS's English search UI.
